title: Tiny Creepers
description: This mod adds tiny little Creepers to the game!
body:
# Tiny Creepers

This mod adds tiny little Creepers to the game!

They're just happy little guys that want hugs, but they get a little too excited and explode upon being hugged!

Since they're still just baby Creepers they haven't developed enough gunpowder to make big explosions. Although they can still be quite deadly if you're not careful, especially if you come in contact with two of them. To make up for that it seems that they're more rare than the regular creeper and go down with a single swing of an iron sword.

This mod should be compatible with pretty much everything and can be removed at any time.

![Fabric API](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/lOyCZ9S1/images/19e9448d93653cf442b62081deabe88fbf9831b7.png)
